Title: Foundation
Actors: Jared Harris, Lou Llobell, Lee Pace
Plot: Far in the future, The Empire is about to face a reckoning unlike anything else it's faced before: several Millenia of chaos has been predicted by the galaxy's leading psycho-historian: Hari Seldon. But can The Empire offset the disaster before it begins?
Awards: Nominated for 2 Primetime Emmys. 3 wins & 31 nominations total
